script.openingLine: Replay begins in Kansas City, where Algeria meet Austria in Group J of the World Cup group stage.

moments.spokenLine: Replay begins as Algeria meet Austria in Group J at Kansas City Stadium.
moments.explainer: The group-stage contest is under way in Kansas City.

moments.spokenLine: Marko ARNAUTOVIC is shown a card for Austria.
moments.explainer: Austria receive the first recorded disciplinary moment.

moments.spokenLine: Marko ARNAUTOVIC strikes for Austria, and the score moves to 0–1.
Rafik BELGHALI answers for Algeria, bringing the score to 1–1.
moments.explainer: Algeria restore parity before the interval.

moments.spokenLine: At half-time, Algeria and Austria are level at 1–1.
moments.explainer: The first half closes with the scores even.

moments.spokenLine: Marcel SABITZER puts Austria back in front at 1–2.
moments.explainer: Austria regain the lead after the interval.

moments.spokenLine: Riyad MAHREZ responds for Algeria, and it is 2–2.
Riyad MAHREZ scores again for Algeria, turning it to 3–2.
moments.explainer: Algeria move ahead for the first time in the verified scoreline.

moments.spokenLine: Sasa KALAJDZIC answers for Austria, making it 3–3.
moments.explainer: Austria level the match once more.

moments.spokenLine: Full time: Algeria and Austria finish 3–3.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Replay begins as Algeria meet Austria in Group J at Kansas City Stadium.
In the 11th minute, Marko ARNAUTOVIC is shown a card for Austria.
In the 28th minute, Marko ARNAUTOVIC strikes for Austria, and the score moves to 0–1.
In the 45th minute, Rafik BELGHALI answers for Algeria, bringing the score to 1–1.
At half-time, Algeria and Austria are level at 1–1.
In the 55th minute, Marcel SABITZER puts Austria back in front at 1–2.
In the 60th minute, Riyad MAHREZ responds for Algeria, and it is 2–2.
In the 3rd minute of second-half stoppage time, Riyad MAHREZ scores again for Algeria, turning it to 3–2.
In the 6th minute of second-half stoppage time, Sasa KALAJDZIC answers for Austria, making it 3–3.
At full-time, Algeria and Austria finish 3–3.
